film.title: One Crazy Summer
film.overview: An aspiring teenage cartoonist and his friends come to the aid of a singer trying to save her family property from developers.

dialogues.dialogue: Grammy. The high school graduates are here.  Look who it is.  My pride and joy.  There's my little girl.  Look what Grammy bought for you.
I heard what you did, Ack Ack. It's all over the island.  You're a hero.  I'm proud of you, Son.  Damn proud.  I want you to come home.
You're a hero.  I'm proud of you, Son.  Damn proud.  I want you to come home.  Does this mean I have to give back the bazooka?
